decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id corridor_webster-ave-bronx-2012, which exists in the registry with matching source 2012_11_sbs_webster_cac4_summary. The observation describes the same Webster Avenue SBS corridor in the Bronx discussed at CAC Meeting #4, confirming identity without linking to a different record.

proposed_relations.description: Both records describe the same Webster Avenue SBS corridor in the Bronx. corridor_webster-ave-bronx is the broader canonical record aggregating many sources; corridor_webster-ave-bronx-2012 is a narrower slice from the 2012 CAC3 workshop and CAC4 summary documents.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The presentation...outlined the goals and outreach process, and summarized the overall progress of the project. Mr. Orosz presented the conceptual design for the Bx41 SBS and a typical SBS station location featuring an offset bus lane...Ms. Reiss then discussed proposed traffic improvements at the Cross Bronx Expressway, East Tremont Avenue, East Fordham Road, and East Gun Hill Road.

proposed_relations.description: Both records describe the same Webster Avenue corridor in the Bronx being studied for SBS. corridor_webster-avenue-bronx-2012 covers earlier CAC meetings (CAC1 and CAC2 summaries), while corridor_webster-ave-bronx-2012 covers later CAC3 workshop and CAC4 summary. Same borough, same corridor name, same SBS project scope.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The New York City Department of Transportation (NYCDOT) and MTA New York City Transit (NYCT), held the fourth Community Advisory Committee (CAC) meeting for the Webster Avenue Select Bus Service (SBS) project
Webster Avenue Select Bus Service Community Advisory Committee Meeting #4 Summary

Mr. Orosz presented the conceptual design for the Bx41 SBS and a typical SBS station location featuring an offset bus lane, highlighting the benefits of the design and its amenities...Ms. Reiss then discussed proposed traffic improvements at the Cross Bronx Expressway, East Tremont Avenue, East Fordham Road, and East Gun Hill Road.
